race.description: Keldan Group Showcase Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: PENINHAND (9) finds her are fourth-up on the back-up. Jumped in trip when she made rapid improvement to finish third over 1280m at this track. Will appreciate Smyth's 3kg claim and take catching from the low gate. NEAREST (5) crunched in betting on debut ($1.50 fav), when he jumped awkwardly and never got into the contest when sixth over 1200m at Tamworth. Extra trip in his favour and look for a stronger showing. PEPPERINA (10) resumes from a lengthy spell after running on late in her two career starts. Back with the one trial over 1200m at Muswellbrook. Look for her late. BRIDEGO (2) far from disgraced from the wide gate on resumption with a plugging fourth over 1000m at Taree. Fitter now and looking for this trip from the inside gate. Each way.
